debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝¹ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
inst✝ : NeZero p
el : ZMod p
er : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)
cl : Option Unit
cr : Circuit p (ZMod p)
w : ℕ
he : el = er.eval
hc : Simulation.s_bisim cl cr.eval
x✝¹ : Option Unit
x✝ : Unit → Option Unit
her : er.eval.val < 2 ^ w
heq : 2 ^ w ≤ er.eval.val
⊢ Simulation.s_bisim none cr.eval

failed_attempts:
contradiction
  all_goals
    simp_all [he]
    try exact hc
    try constructor

all_goals try simp_all [he]
  all_goals try constructor

constructor
  case _ _ _ hel =>
    simp at hel
    rw [he] at hel
    simp
    split
    . apply hc
    . contradiction

contradiction
  all_goals
    try subst he
    try exact hc
    try constructor
    try contradiction

exact absurd her (Nat.not_lt_of_ge heq)
  case _ _ hel her =>
    constructor
  case _ _ _ hel =>
    simp at hel
    rw [he] at hel
    simp
    split
    . apply hc
    . contradiction

constructor
  case _ _ _ hel =>
    simp at hel
    rw [he] at hel
    simp
    split
    . apply hc
    . contradiction

try exact hc
    try constructor
    try
      simp at *
      rw [he] at *
      contradiction
(simp at *; rw [he] at *; contradiction); try apply hc; try constructor)

all_goals try constructor
  all_goals try { simp at *; rw [he] at *; contradiction }

rw [← Nat.not_lt] at heq
    contradiction
  all_goals
    try rw [he] at *
    try contradiction
    try exact hc
    try constructor
apply hc; try constructor; try { rw [he] at *; contradiction })

try exact hc
    try constructor
    try
      simp at *
      rw [he] at *
      contradiction

case _ => rw [he] at *; contradiction
  case _ => constructor
